title: CC: RJ45
description: This mod adds new connection capabilities to your game.
body:
# CC:RJ45

This mod adds wired connectors and hubs for CC:Tweaked.

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GZ875jdx/images/f0da672c800088c6927089e676554bca0a04641c.jpeg)

## Blocks & Items

**Net Cable Connector** (`net_cable_connector`) — connects to any solid surface. Up to 2 links per connector. Acts as a standard Computer Craft wire.

**Net Cable Hub** (`net_cable_hub`) — same form factor, 4 links.

**Net Connector Cable** (`net_connector_cable`) — the linking item. Right-click two connectors to create a cable link. Sneak + right-click to break a link.

**Portable Drive** (`portable_drive`) — a portable hard drive for CC:Tweaked computers. Dyeable, works in any disk drive. Crafted with terracotta and amethyst. (1MB Storage)

## Cable Linking
- Links are distance-limited (default 15 blocks, configurable up to 256)
- Destroying a connector or hub automatically breaks its links
- Disconnect: empty hand + sneak + right-click two connected blocks


If you would like to translate the mod, have found a bug, or want to suggest something new:

Discord: Cyber_Jellyfish
